ab: kai vaiyana mo tatakesikesiyako ki ’ito ka toki ki miyalrealre.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: la ai kicakwanganai, sa modaane ko sinsinai ki takibolrobolrowa, ko pangcan kai taberanai la aminiya kawriva “’idiya! songalra!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: la akwadrawnai makanaelre sinsi “mwadringadringaiso amiya kawariva.
sa kicakwakwa nai, ko sinsinai la ’elaela naiya sinTaromakana wasi’i.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Rukai language of numbers.

ab: la to’a’arlanai wasi’i, ko sinsinai la ’elaela naiya ‘asenaya ki ’wasi’i.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: makalra kai kicekwaneli si la wathingalenganako sin Taromakana.
en: I have learned many Rukai languages.

ab: watwakesi yako tothadalrane, wakicakwako ki kwacalrilrisiyana tothadalrane, ai ’akilalrako ki tinali.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Rukai language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
